calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2008 Off Calendar

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2008 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of A Claim For A Minor.
Off Calendar May-01-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Two Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Steven Fabbro, Esq. for Petitioner: Effie Loufas present as Guardian ad litem for: Vacili Foufas and Katatina Loufas, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, each Petition is granted and each compromise is approved.
As to Minor: Katarina Loufas
Attorney's Fees $17,864.62
Medical Expenses $25,121.97
Costs $3,541.50
A net balance of $28,471.91 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank , 145 West Portal Ave., San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

As to Minor:Vacili Loufas Loufas
Attorney's Fees $30,364.62
Medical Expenses $39,236.35
Costs $3,541.50
A net balance of $51,857.53 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank , 145 West Portal Ave., San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim and Orders to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
